ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "danceability" REAL /* How suitable a track is for dancing */,
  "energy" REAL /* Overall energy of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* The estimated overall key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* The overall loudness of a track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major or minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* The presence of spoken words in a track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* The presence of acoustic instruments */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* The presence of non-vocal instruments */,
  "liveness" REAL /* The presence of a live audience */,
  "valence" REAL /* The musical positiveness */,
  "tempo" REAL /* The estimated tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the track on a scale from 0 to 100 */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the track has explicit content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre(s) of the artist */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nationality of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity of the artist on a scale from 0 to 100 */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that created the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "number_of_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist (public, private, collaborative) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's cover image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" INTEGER /* ID of the user's subscription type */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "following" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs the user is following */,
  "followers" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs following the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_type FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_type") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, add to playlist) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played by the user */,
  "last_played_date" TEXT /* Date the user last played the track */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has skipped the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the audio feature */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Estimated overall time signature of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nationality */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription type */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription type */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features available with the subscription */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the subscription (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "trial_period" TEXT /* Length of the trial period, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)
